title: CHRISTMAS SILENT DISCO NORTHAMPTON
description: Northampton's most festive tradition is back for its tenth year. The Christmas Silent Disco takes over The Picturedrome with three channels of joy: Wham! and Mariah on Blue, indie anthems on Red, and dance bangers on Green. Add glowing headphones, confetti, and a crowd that knows every word, and you've got a party that's more fun than any office do. Expect hilarious headphone-off moments, mass singalongs, and the smug walk home knowing you just nailed Christmas the Boombastic way.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ Northampton - Christmas Daytime Disco
description: Your Christmas daytime rave is here. Northampton's 2PM Club packs four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s classics into one festive-soaked afternoon. Think Whitney confetti moments, Robbie singalongs, and everyone in sequins or Santa hats, losing themselves in the music before dinner time. It's the no-hangover Christmas party: maximum fun, minimum faff. When Bon Jovi or Mariah hits and the whole room erupts, you'll know why this is the festive tradition that actually works.

title: Boombastic's Christmas Decades Party NORTHAMPTON
description: The Christmas party to end them all. Three decades. One dance floor. Zero shame. Northampton's ultimate festive knees-up blends the best of the 80s, 90s and 00s into one glitter-covered night. From Spice Girls to Oasis, Britney to Bon Jovi, every anthem gets its moment. Expect big choruses, sequins everywhere, and confetti raining down as the year wraps up in style. Forget boring work dos — this is where you'll actually want to be, belting every lyric until your throat gives out.

title: Christmas FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton
description: Jumpers on, headphones glowing, Christmas tunes blasting — Northampton's Family Silent Disco is back with a festive twist. Kids get their Disney joy on Blue, teens vibe with chart hits on Green, and parents relive throwback anthems on Red. All on the same floor, all at the same time, all buzzing with festive energy. Add Santa hats, confetti, and two hours of non-stop silliness, and you've got a December tradition worth repeating. A family Christmas memory that beats shopping queues every time.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ Milton Keynes - Christmas Daytime Disco
description: Your Christmas daytime rave lands in Milton Keynes. The 2PM Club packs four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s classics into one festive-soaked afternoon at MK11. Think Whitney confetti moments, Robbie singalongs, and everyone in sequins or Santa hats, losing themselves in the music before dinner time. title: GET READY - 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco Sunday Matinee Special
description: Join us for a Sunday matinee special of GET READY featuring the BIGGEST hits of 60s/70s Motown, Soul and Disco! Come and banish the January blues with an afternoon of 1960s and 70s classics. Our DJs will play the biggest floorfillers of the era including The Jacksons, Al Wilson, Stevie Wonder, The Four Tops, Rick James, Chic, Sister Sledge, The Temptations, James Brown, Diana Ross, The Supremes, The Marvelettes, Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, Ray Charles and more. Tickets just £6 each until 24th Dec!

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ LUTON - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Luton, your afternoon is about to change forever. The 2PM Club lands with a four-hour soundtrack of 80s, 90s and 00s hits, the kind of anthems you've been dying to sing at full tilt with your mates. Expect confetti explosions, inflatable mic singalongs, and a buzzing dance floor filled with legends who still know every word. It's the proper night-out energy you crave, but at a time that actually works. Dance hard, sing louder, and feel smug when you're home, happy, and hangover-free by 7.
